title: Microphone Permissions & Issues
description: Troubleshoot microphone permissions and recording issues in apps.

steps.instruction: Open Windows Settings → Privacy & Security → Microphone. Ensure 'Microphone access' is turned ON for your device.
Scroll down and ensure 'Let desktop apps access your microphone' is turned ON (this is required for Teams, Zoom, Slack).
Check the meeting app (Teams/Zoom) settings: Ensure the correct Microphone input device is selected and not muted inside the app.
Check physical mute buttons on your headset's cord or earcup.
Right-click the speaker icon in the taskbar → Sound Settings → Input. Test your microphone there to see if the volume bar moves.
